metadata.description: Artful Making skills for vibe coders — shape, validate, brief, stage. 16 skills across the full flow cycle.

plugins.name: stage-manager
plugins.description: 16 Artful Making skills for vibe coders across the Shape-to-Stage flow cycle. Shape skills analyze specs for gaps, collapsed options, risks, and soul drift. Validate skills prove the premise before a line of code. Stage skills chunk work, craft prompts, mirror sessions, and capture decisions. The mirror never goes dark.
